Package com.mentor.chs.api.servicedoc

  • Interface Summary 
    Interface Description
    IXDesignDataGenerator
    Interface for generating Design data.
    IXDiagramDataGenerator
    Interface for generating Diagram data.
    IXGenerator
    Parent Interface for all the providers that can be accessed by a packager for publishing the data in Capital Publisher
    IXObjectDataGenerator
    An interface for implementing custom links for a given design object while generating a package within Capital Publisher.
    IXPackager
    Generic interface to create a customized packager for publishing the data in Capital Publisher The infrastructure calls the generate method and the generation can generate the data for viewing by a particular viewer.
    IXPackagerContext
    An interface that represents the packager context when publishing the data in Capital Publisher.
    IXPackagerSpecificGenerator
    Implement the interface in your generator classes to make them available to specific packagers.
    IXProjectDataGenerator
    Interface for generating project level data.
    IXResourceGenerator<T extends IXObject>
    Generic interface which can be implemented to create resource generators for classes that implement IXObject.
    IXResourceGeneratorResult
    IXResourceGeneratorResult class allows a generator (e.g.
